title: ZXPong Game Modes
description: Discover Solo play and World PVP in ZXPong, from practising against the AI to competing with players around the world.
summary: Choose between Solo play and World PVP to enjoy ZXPong your way.

sections.heading: Solo Play
paragraphs: Solo Play is the perfect place to learn the game, improve your reactions, and master paddle control before taking on other players.
Ten AI difficulty levels let you gradually increase the challenge as your skills improve.

sections.heading: World PVP
paragraphs: World PVP lets you compete against players from around the world in fast-paced online matches.
Every rally tests your reactions, positioning, and consistency, making every match a unique challenge.

sections.heading: Future Multiplayer
paragraphs: World PVP is the multiplayer mode currently available in ZXPong.
Local PVP is planned for a future update and will be introduced when it's ready.

images.caption: Choose how you want to play.

faq.question: Is Local PVP available?
faq.answer: Not yet. World PVP is the multiplayer mode currently available, while Local PVP is planned for a future update.

featureShowcases.heading: Choose Your Challenge
featureShowcases.summary: Whether you prefer practising against the AI or competing online, ZXPong has a mode to suit your style.
body: Solo Play is ideal for improving your timing, reactions, and rally control, while World PVP lets you test those skills against players around the world.
Whichever mode you choose, every match helps you improve, unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher leaderboard positions.
bullets: Unlock achievements and climb the leaderboards.

image.caption: Choose the mode that matches your style of play.
